title: FiveSeasonStuff Artificial Silk Rose Garlands (Set of 2), Cream White Flower Vines Total 4.4 Metres, Lifelike Hanging Decoration for Weddings, Home, Garden, Parties, DIY Projects
features: Lifelike Artificial Flower Garlands for Home Decoration: Add a touch of elegance to your space with our realistic cream white silk rose vines. These artificial flowers for decoration feature lifelike roses and lush foliage, perfect for enhancing your home décor, weddings, gardens, or party decorations.

Versatile and Easy-to-Use Decorative Vines: Our flexible garlands for home decoration can be draped over arches, doorways, trellises, gazebos, or walls. They're ideal for creating stunning flower walls, beautifying your indoor and outdoor décor, or adding charm to festive ornaments and party supplies.

High-Quality Materials with Lasting Beauty: Crafted from premium silk and durable plastic, these fake flowers and faux greenery are designed to stay vibrant over time. To achieve a fresh, full appearance, simply fluff the rose petals to revive the blooms after unpacking.

Perfect for DIY Projects and Creative Floral Accessories: With a total length of 4.4 metres, you can trim and shape these flower garlands to create wreaths, table centrepieces, or unique decorative pieces. They're great for DIY enthusiasts crafting bridal flowers, festival decorations, or personalized celebration accessories.

Ideal for Special Occasions and Romantic Décor: Whether you're planning a wedding, celebrating a festival, or just looking to enhance your home, these decorative vines are the perfect choice. Use them as ceremony decorations, reception décor, or to add a touch of romance to your living space.
description: Product description Add a Touch of Elegance with FiveSeasonStuff's Artificial Silk Rose GarlandsLooking to brighten up your space with a hint of nature's beauty? Our Artificial Silk Rose Garlands are here to help! This set includes two cream white rose vines, each measuring 220 cm (86.6 inches), giving you a total of 4.4 metres (14.4 feet) to work with. Made from high-quality silk and plastic, these flower garlands look so realistic that you'll forget they're not fresh from the garden. Why You'll Love Them: Versatile Decoration for Any Occasion: Perfect for weddings, garden parties, home decor, and more. Drape them over doorways, wrap them around pillars, or hang them on walls to create a stunning backdrop . Easy to Customize: The flexible silk rose vines can be trimmed and shaped to fit your creative ideas. Craft beautiful wreaths, decorate your gazebo, or add a romantic touch to your bedroom. Durable and Long-Lasting: Enjoy the beauty of artificial flowers for decoration that don't wilt or fade. They're low maintenance and can be reused for multiple events or seasons. A Little Tip: When you first unpack your garlands, the rose petals might be a bit flattened from shipping. Simply fluff the petals gently with your fingers to revive the blooms and bring them back to life! Endless Possibilities for Your DecorFrom garlands for home decoration to event embellishments, these rose vines are ideal for: Enhancing your wedding arch or ceremony backdrop Creating a charming atmosphere at parties and festivals Adding a romantic touch to your living room or garden DIY projects and crafts to personalize your space Product Details: Quantity: 2 x Artificial Silk Rose Garlands Length: Each vine is 220 cm (86.6 inches); total length is 4.4 metres (14.4 feet) Flower Size: Roses range from 5 cm to 10 cm (2.0 to 3.9 inches) Leaf Size: Approximately 5 cm x 3 cm (2.0 x 1.2 inches) Materials: Flowers and leaves made of silk; vines made of plastic A Note to Our Customers: Some flowers and leaves may come loose during shipping, but don't worry—they can be easily reattached. Colours may vary slightly due to different monitor settings. Make Every Moment Special At FiveSeasonStuff, we believe that little details make a big difference. Our flower garlands are designed to bring joy and beauty to your life. Recommended Uses: Wedding ceremonies and receptions Bridal showers and hen parties Garden parties and outdoor events Home décor accents for living rooms, bedrooms, or dining areas Seasonal decorations for holidays like Christmas or Easter Shop window displays and retail decorations School plays and theatrical props Hotel and restaurant embellishments Photo shoot backdrops Floral arrangements for special occasions Specific Uses: Decorating wedding arches and altars Enhancing marquee interiors Draping over fireplace mantles Adorning stairway banisters Creating romantic bedroom canopies Crafting DIY wreaths and centrepieces Embellishing garden gazebos and pergolas Covering unsightly areas or structures Accenting mirrors and picture frames Dressing up festival and fair stalls Special Features: Lifelike and Realistic Design: Mimics real roses and foliage for a natural look. Durable Materials: Made from premium silk and plastic for longevity. Flexible Vines: Easily shaped and adjusted for various decorative needs. Low Maintenance: No watering or upkeep required, unlike real flowers. Reusable: Can be used multiple times for different events and occasions. Lightweight: Easy to hang, drape, or attach without heavy fixtures. UV-Resistant Colours: Designed to prevent fading when exposed to sunlight. Eco-Friendly Alternative: Provides the beauty of flowers without environmental impact. Allergy-Friendly: Safe for those with pollen allergies. Easy to Clean: Simply wipe with a soft cloth to remove dust. Safety Warning Attention: Avoid contact with water, especially when using for the first time, to avoid damage to the leaves. Carefully use the product indoors and outdoors to protect it from the elements.
